name: Helia Group Limited
analysis: HLI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.4700, stop A$4.4649, target A$8.4853 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
